title: From wood wisdom to wood values and beyond
subtitle: Research project collaborations for increased innovation and competitiveness of the European forest-based sector
description: A monograph summarizing and analysing the impact of EU-funded transnational collaboration and research projects on innovation and competitiveness in the European forest-based sector. It provides an overview of ERA-NET initiatives, funded projects, and expert insights to chart the evolution of forest research and support sustainable bioeconomy development.
